MOHIT KUMAR
Data Scientist
91 9953821928 mohitkumartanwar.in@gmail.com linkedin.c
https://huggingface.co/spaces/mhtkmr/professional-clone India
SUMMARY
Data Scientist with 4.5 years of experience building and deploying
production-grade machine learning systems on GCP. Specialized in
regression, churn modeling, explainable AI, and LLM-based systems
including Text2SQL and RAG architectures. Proven track record of deli
measurable business impact, including 15% predictive accuracy
improvement and $120K annual cost savings.
EXPERIENCE
Data Scientist
XPO
• Developed a Text2SQL Gemini LLM-chatbot with Database-Augm
Generation. Enabled domain-specific SQL generation using Pydan
schemas
• Built a semantic-layer filtering mechanism to reduce irrelevant LLM
context injection and improve query precision
• Developed an LLM-based workflow for email classification and
automated responses with intelligent document retrieval. Deployed
serverlessly on Google Cloud Functions with Pub/Sub-based even
processing, handling 10,000 emails per day
• Engineered compound features and trained XGBoost regression mo
Optuna tuned), achieving 15% improvement in exact-date ETA
prediction accuracy. Performed cross-validation and feature impor
analysis to ensure model robustness
• Led a two-tiered churn modeling framework (classification + revenu
regression) achieving 50% churn revenue capture by targeting top
customers. Evaluated using precision-recall tradeoff to optimize
business ROI
• Applied SHAP explainability techniques to identify churn drivers an
support business decision-making
Data Science Engineer
XPO
• Automated BigQuery DDL generation via Python framework, facilit
60 object deployments through enhanced API metadata extractio
data type mapping.
• Developed IICS Taskflows for seamless integration of Salesforce an
ServiceNow with BigQuery, optimizing data processing workflows.
• Implemented a BigQuery Command Center in Looker Studio to mon
slot utilization and utilized insights to reduce overcapacity and save
$120,000 annually through a 63% reduction in slot renewal budget
• Developed and managed ETL/ELT data pipelines between Oracle
database and Google BigQuery
Google Cloud Platform Admin
XPO
• Oversaw comprehensive deployments leveraging Cloud Composer
Airflow), Cloud Run, and Cloud Functions.
• Employed IAM roles for GBQ Management and Terraform for servic
account creation and management.
EDUCATION
M.Tech
G
Indian Institute of Technology Bombay
9.58
07/2019 - 06/2021 India
• Developed a U-Net ResNet backbone) based semantic
segmentation model for land use & land cover classification o
Copernicus/ESA satellite imagery
• Implemented YOLOv3 object detection pipeline to identify ai
on airport runways during COVID mobility restrictions
